variants.newElement: the final night stands behind you
variants.angle: being at the final without a ticket, proof of presence for the one night every fan wants it

variants.newElement: a vintage team crest grafted over one corner
variants.angle: the picture everyone already curates quietly wears the badge

variants.newElement: a credited slot in the weekly fan reel
variants.angle: the archive fans already shoot becomes a stage that restocks itself

briefs.audience: fans following the world cup final without a ticket
briefs.insight: the final is the one night every fan wants proof of presence, and almost none of them can be in the building
briefs.assetXElement: your selfie x the final night stands behind you
briefs.successMetric: generation to share rate within 48 hours

generationPrompts.image: Editorial phone frame composition: a casual selfie recomposed so the subject stands inside a packed stadium at night during a cup final, gold confetti falling, floodlights blooming, crowd bokeh behind. Before and after split, left the original plain selfie, right the final night version. Photorealistic, warm light, subtle grain, 16:9, short overlay copy area at bottom left.
generationPrompts.motion: [for ChatCut] three shot script: shot 1 the plain selfie on a phone screen; shot 2 the same face placed into the roaring final night stands, confetti mid air; shot 3 the hook line lands over the crowd, 6 seconds total
generationPrompts.copy: Write one hook line, 20 words or fewer, present tense, about being at the final without a ticket, restrained tone, no exclamation marks

briefs.audience: fans whose profile picture is their most curated possession
briefs.insight: a profile picture is the one image everyone already maintains, and a small crest graft signals fandom while the face stays untouched
briefs.assetXElement: your profile picture x a vintage team crest grafted over one corner
briefs.successMetric: 7 day adoption of the grafted picture as an actual profile photo

generationPrompts.image: A profile picture recomposed with a small vintage football crest painted over the lower corner, enamel pin texture, the face untouched and fully recognizable, studio light, square crop presented on a 16:9 paper white field with a thin hairline frame.
generationPrompts.motion: [for ChatCut] three shot script: shot 1 the untouched profile picture; shot 2 the crest paints itself on in one stroke; shot 3 the picture snaps into a social profile header, 6 seconds total
generationPrompts.copy: Write one hook line, 20 words or fewer, about wearing the badge on the picture you already use, restrained tone, no exclamation marks

briefs.audience: fans posting match day photos all tournament
briefs.insight: fans already shoot the tournament every week, and a credited slot in an official weekly reel turns their archive into a stage
briefs.assetXElement: your match day photos x a credited slot in the weekly fan reel
briefs.successMetric: submission to publish conversion per weekly reel

generationPrompts.image: A grid of six varied fan made match day photos arranged as a weekly reel cover, each tile carrying a small credit tag with a handle, one tile highlighted as the week's opener, editorial paper white margins, thin hairlines, 16:9.
generationPrompts.motion: [for ChatCut] three shot script: shot 1 a fan's camera roll scrolling; shot 2 one photo lifts into the reel grid and gains a credit tag; shot 3 the reel cover locks with the week number, 6 seconds total
generationPrompts.copy: Write one hook line, 20 words or fewer, inviting fans to submit match day photos for a credited weekly reel, restrained tone, no exclamation marks

plan.rationale: Wave 3 splits traffic evenly across three variants for "the world cup final"; the 21-day observation window covers the full fatigue-curve inflection point

produced.name: WEB_CONV_TOF_HOT_STIL_BEIN_THEWOR_FANS_V03
produced.copy: The final sold out months ago. Your seat did not.

motionScript: Shot 1: a plain selfie sits on a phone screen
Shot 2: the same face stands in the roaring final night stands, confetti mid air
Shot 3: the hook line lands over the crowd, held one beat

produced.name: WEB_CONV_MOF_EVG_STIL_THEP_THEWOR_FANS_V03
produced.copy: The badge goes where everyone already looks.

produced.name: WEB_CONV_MOF_EVG_MOTN_THEP_THEWOR_FANS_V03
produced.copy: Same picture you always use, wearing the crest now.
motionScript: Shot 1: the untouched profile picture, square, familiar
Shot 2: a vintage crest paints itself onto the lower corner in one stroke
Shot 3: the picture snaps into a social profile header

produced.name: WEB_CONV_BOF_LOOP_STIL_THEA_THEWOR_FANS_V03
produced.copy: Your match photos, credited, in this week's reel.

produced.name: WEB_CONV_BOF_LOOP_MOTN_THEA_THEWOR_FANS_V03
produced.copy: Shot on your phone. Opening this week's reel.
motionScript: Shot 1: a fan's camera roll scrolls past match day photos
Shot 2: one photo lifts into the reel grid and gains a credit tag
Shot 3: the reel cover locks with the week number

judged.notes: Before and after split lands the graft cleanly; reserved copy area unused, noted only.
Before and after split lands the graft cleanly; reserved copy area unused, noted only.
Face untouched, crest reads as enamel pin; quiet by design.
Face untouched, crest reads as enamel pin; quiet by design.
Credit tags and opener highlight make the loop mechanics visible.
Credit tags and opener highlight make the loop mechanics visible.

decided.reason: last-3-day average CTR 0.0013 fell below the preregistered killAt 0.015: verdict: kill
last-3-day average CTR 0.0377 reached the preregistered scaleAt 0.035: verdict: scale
last-3-day average CTR 0.0293 sits between killAt and scaleAt, slope has not tripped the fatigue threshold: verdict: iterate

injectedLearnings: Winning traits from wave 2: thing asset "your profile picture" + angleType=evergreen + HOOK=GRAF. Prioritize reusing these asset shapes and angleType combinations in new variants.

channels.assetSpec: Square 1:1 feed crop plus a 9:16 Reel cut, the crest graft framed as the thumbnail focal point so the reveal reads at a glance.
executionSteps: Post the reveal Reel in the first 48 hours of the observation window.
Lead the caption with the hook: your profile picture x a vintage team crest grafted over one corner.
Seed the first posts directly into fans whose profile picture is their most curated possession.
Track instagram reach and saves against the wave's preregistered thresholds every day.
channels.kpi: 3.5% instagram engagement rate inside the 21 day window
channels.kpiThresholdNote: Matches the plan's preregistered scaleAt of 0.035 for the evergreen angle. An instagram reading at or above this rate counts as a SCALE equivalent signal for this channel.

channels.assetSpec: Vertical 9:16 cut under 15 seconds, the crest painting itself on in one stroke restated as on screen text in the first 2 seconds.
executionSteps: Ship the tiktok cut inside the first 48 hours of the observation window.
Lead with the formula hook: your profile picture x a vintage team crest grafted over one corner.
Cross post the same cut from at least one adjacent fan account to widen reach.
Track tiktok performance against the wave's preregistered thresholds every day.
channels.kpi: 3.5% tiktok engagement rate inside the 21 day window
channels.kpiThresholdNote: Matches the plan's preregistered scaleAt of 0.035 for the evergreen angle. A tiktok reading at or above this rate counts as a SCALE equivalent signal for this channel.

channels.assetSpec: 1:1 crop tuned for the platform's own circular mask, the crest positioned in the lower corner so it survives the crop.
executionSteps: Surface the grafted picture as a one tap profile photo update inside the first 48 hours.
Prompt the viewer to carry the graft into their own profile before the post ages out.
Track 7 day adoption of the grafted picture as an actual profile photo every day.
Report daily adoption counts against the wave's preregistered thresholds.
channels.kpi: 12.0% profile photo adoption rate within the 7 day window
channels.kpiThresholdNote: Adoption is read against the same preregistered scaleAt of 0.035 for the evergreen angle, scaled up because adoption is a stronger action than a click. A reading at or above 12.0% counts as a SCALE equivalent signal for this channel.

channels.assetSpec: 16:9 still posted natively, the hook line carried as the post text, the crest kept legible at preview size.
executionSteps: Post the still natively inside the first 48 hours of the observation window.
Pin a direct link back to the grafted picture so the call to action has one clear next step.
Reply to the pinned post with the three shot motion cut once it clears judge.
Track x engagement rate against the wave's preregistered thresholds every day.
channels.kpi: 3.5% x engagement rate inside the 21 day window
channels.kpiThresholdNote: Matches the plan's preregistered scaleAt of 0.035 for the evergreen angle. An x reading at or above this rate counts as a SCALE equivalent signal for this channel.
